testsuite.name: Feature: sidebar-workflow-agent-redesign, Property 3: workflow card click passes prompt

testcase.classname: Feature: sidebar-workflow-agent-redesign, Property 3: workflow card click passes prompt
testcase.name: 全AGENT_CARDSカードはtitleKeyとpromptTemplateKeyが有効な非空文字列を持つ

testcase.classname: Feature: sidebar-workflow-agent-redesign, Property 4: agent-card binding auto-selection
testcase.name: agentId有無でAgent自動選択の発生が決定される

testcase.classname: Feature: sidebar-workflow-agent-redesign, Property 5: highlight state determined by agentId match
testcase.name: ハイライト条件は card.agentId !== undefined && card.agentId === selectedAgentId

testcase.classname: Feature: sidebar-workflow-agent-redesign, Property 5: highlight state determined by agentId match
testcase.name: selectedAgentIdがnullの場合、全カードはハイライトされない
